emotional_tone: Objective, authoritative, efficient, and precise. A command center for content.

rules.headings: Use radical weight contrast. H1/H2 must be font-black (900) and tightly tracked (tracking-tighter).

layout.spacing_system: Generous padding internally, tight gaps between widgets. Use p-6 or p-8 for card internals. gap-4 or gap-6 for grids.
layout.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Dense, data-heavy. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Stretch children to match height.
layout.surface_strategy: GRID BORDERS (The Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. Use flat solid surfaces. No Glassmorphism.
layout.borders_and_radius: Sharp edges. Use rounded-none or max rounded-sm (4px) for a brutalist, functional feel. 1px solid borders.

components_instructions.table: Use Shadcn Table. Implement sortable columns. Left-align text, right-align numbers. Use inline status badges (Published/Draft) instead of plain text. Flat styling, no outer container shadows.
components_instructions.buttons: Square edges (rounded-none). High contrast. Primary: bg-[#0055FF] text-white hover:bg-[#0033CC]. Secondary: bg-white text-zinc-900 border border-zinc-200 hover:bg-zinc-100.
components_instructions.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-zinc-200), NO shadow by default. On hover: subtle shadow-sm and border darkens.
components_instructions.header: Solid white background with a hard 1px bottom border. z-50 sticky top. Must include branding and navigation.
components_instructions.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='copy-link-btn', data-testid='publish-status-badge').

motion.general: Minimalist. Snappy transitions for hover states. No bouncy animations. Optimize for speed.

icons.instructions: Use for inline actions (copy link, open external, publish), status indicators, and column headers. Keep stroke width crisp.

logo.description: App logo for the header navigation

placeholders.description: Mock thumbnail for Telegraph post item
Alternative mock thumbnail for Telegraph post item

specific_functionality_views.dashboard_stats: Top row summary cards (Total Posts, Total Published). Col-span-1 each. Huge typography for numbers, sharp borders.
specific_functionality_views.post_list: Data table occupying col-span-full. Columns: Thumbnail (small 40x40 square), Title, Date, Telegraph Link (with inline copy icon), Telegram Channel Status (Badge). Row hover reveals 'View Details' action.
specific_functionality_views.post_detail: Slide-out panel (Sheet) or dedicated view. Shows full media count, complete telegraph link, and an explicit action to 'Publish to Channel'.
